title: rubus × latithyrsus
intro: Rubus × latithyrsus is a hybrid plant belonging to the rose family, derived from the cross between the blackberry (Rubus fruticosus) and the raspberry (Rubus idaeus). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × latithyrsus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rubus × latithyrsus is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots are also used in salves and creams for topical application.
